content.cn_text: [旁白]: 测验2 你将听到一些不同的录音
content.en_text: [Narrator]: Test 2 You will hear a number of different recordings

content.cn_text: 你必须根据你听到的内容回答问题。
content.en_text: and you will have to answer questions on what you hear.

content.cn_text: 你将有时间阅读说明和问题，并且有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions and you will have a chance to

content.cn_text: 检查你的答案。
content.en_text: check your work.

content.cn_text: 所有录音都只播放一次。
content.en_text: All the recordings will be played once only.

content.cn_text: 本次测验分为四个部分。
content.en_text: The test is in four sections.

content.cn_text: 测验结束时，你将有十分钟的时间将答案誊写到答题卡上。
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an answer

content.cn_text: 答题卡。
content.en_text: sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在翻到第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 1.

content.cn_text: 第一部分 你将听到一段电话对话
content.en_text: Section 1 You will hear a telephone conversation between

content.cn_text: 来自野六月麻雀度假村的雇主和一名申请者。
content.en_text: an employer from the Wild June Sparrow Resort and an applicant.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看问题1到5。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 1 to 5.

content.cn_text: 你会看到有一个已经为你完成的例子。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example which has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 仅此一次，与此相关的对话将首先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 你好，是约翰·墨菲吗？
content.en_text: [Ed]: Hello, is this John Murphy?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 嗨，是的。
content.en_text: [John]: Hi, yes it is.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 嗨，约翰，我是野六月麻雀度假村的艾德·海森堡，打电话是关于你的
content.en_text: [Ed]: Hi John, this is Ed Heisenberg from the Wild June Sparrow Resort calling about your

content.cn_text: 救生员职位的申请。
content.en_text: application for our lifeguard position.

content.cn_text: 你有几分钟时间聊聊吗？
content.en_text: Do you have a few minutes to talk?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 是的，当然。
content.en_text: [John]: Yes, absolutely.

content.cn_text: [旁白]: 雇主说他打电话是关于他们救生员职位的申请。
content.en_text: [Narrator]: The employer says that he is calling about the application for their lifeguard position.

content.cn_text: 所以，空格中已经填入了“救生员”。
content.en_text: So, lifeguard has been written in the space.

content.cn_text: 现在我们开始。
content.en_text: Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你应边听边回答问题，因为你不会听到第二次录音。
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen because you will not hear the recording

content.cn_text: 第二次。
content.en_text: a second time.

content.cn_text: 仔细听并回答问题1到5。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions 1 to 5.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 你好，是约翰·墨菲吗？
content.en_text: [Ed]: Hello, is this John Murphy?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 嗨，是的。
content.en_text: [John]: Hi, yes it is.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 嗨，约翰，我是野六月麻雀度假村的艾德·海森堡，打电话是关于你的
content.en_text: [Ed]: Hi John, this is Ed Heisenberg from the Wild June Sparrow Resort calling about your

content.cn_text: 救生员职位的申请。
content.en_text: application for our lifeguard position.

content.cn_text: 你有几分钟时间聊聊吗？
content.en_text: Do you have a few minutes to talk?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 是的，当然。
content.en_text: [John]: Yes, absolutely.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 很好，你能给我你的地址吗？
content.en_text: [Ed]: Great, could you give me your address?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 当然，我的地址是埃尔西诺法院45号。
content.en_text: [John]: Sure, my address is 45 Elsinore Court.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 抱歉，是埃莉诺吗？
content.en_text: [Ed]: I am sorry, was that Eleanor?

content.cn_text: 你能为我拼写一下吗？
content.en_text: Could you spell that for me?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 当然，是Elsinore，E-L-S-I-N-O-R-E。
content.en_text: [John]: Sure, it is Elsinore, E-L-S-I-N-O-R-E.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 好的，谢谢。
content.en_text: [Ed]: Okay, thanks.

content.cn_text: 这是我们以后联系你的电话号码吗？
content.en_text: And is this the number we should reach you at in the future?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 不，那是我的家庭电话。
content.en_text: [John]: No, that is my home phone.

content.cn_text: 但我还是给你我的手机号码吧。
content.en_text: But let me give you my mobile number instead.

content.cn_text: 打这个电话给我。
content.en_text: Call me on that one.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 好的，我记下来了。
content.en_text: [Ed]: Okay, I will make a note of that.

content.cn_text: 你能告诉我你的空闲时间吗？
content.en_text: Could you tell me your availability?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 当然，我通常下午或周末有空。
content.en_text: [John]: Sure, I am usually available during afternoons or weekends.

content.cn_text: 我宁愿不要在工作日晚上排班，因为我兼职做服务员。
content.en_text: I would prefer not to be scheduled on weeknights because I work part-time as a waiter.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 那应该不是问题，反正我们也不营业到很晚。
content.en_text: [Ed]: That shouldn't be a problem since we don't stay open very late anyway.

content.cn_text: 你还有其他工作经验吗？
content.en_text: And do you have any other employment experience?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 是的，我在其他几个地方工作过。
content.en_text: [John]: Yes, I have worked at a few other places.

content.cn_text: 上个赛季我是里士满高中的棒球教练。
content.en_text: I was the baseball coach at Richmond High School last season.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 我明白了。
content.en_text: [Ed]: I see.

content.cn_text: 你还有其他想让我们在申请中注意的经验吗？
content.en_text: And do you have any other experience that you would like us to note on your application?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 是的，去年我在海滩做救援潜水员。
content.en_text: [John]: Yes, last year I worked at the beach as a rescue diver.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 救援潜水员？
content.en_text: [Ed]: Rescue diver?

content.cn_text: 听起来很紧张。
content.en_text: That sounds intense.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 嗯，这其实就像救生员一样，只是在海里而不是在泳池里。
content.en_text: [John]: Well, it's really just like being a lifeguard except in the ocean instead of pool.

content.cn_text: 所以有点像在世界上最大的泳池当救生员。
content.en_text: So kind of like being a lifeguard at the world's largest pool.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 我明白了。
content.en_text: [Ed]: I see.

content.cn_text: 现在请听并回答问题6-10。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 6-10.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 那么你能告诉我你有哪些相关技能吗？
content.en_text: [Ed]: So could you tell me about the relevant skills you have?

content.cn_text: 我猜你经验丰富，应该很多吧。
content.en_text: I'm guessing a lot given your experience.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 我有心肺复苏术认证，并且有两年潜水经验。
content.en_text: [John]: I'm CPR certified and have two years of diving experience.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 太棒了，听起来你非常适合这个职位。
content.en_text: [Ed]: Great, it sounds like you are well qualified for this position.

content.cn_text: 你的心肺复苏术认证何时到期？
content.en_text: When does your CPR certification expire?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 嗯，我想是在十一月，但我让我快速检查一下我的心肺复苏术卡。
content.en_text: [John]: Hmm, I think in November, but let me quickly check my CPR card.

content.cn_text: 实际上，它在十月到期。
content.en_text: Actually, it expires in October.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 好的，所以无论如何，你夏天结束前都有效，你理想的工作时间是什么时候？
content.en_text: [Ed]: Okay, so regardless you have it through the end of the summer, when is your ideal time to work?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 因为我工作日晚上在餐厅工作，所以我最喜欢周末，特别是周六上午。
content.en_text: [John]: Since I work in the restaurant on weeknights, I like weekends best, specifically Saturday mornings.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 我明白了，我们周六已经有很多员工有空了，
content.en_text: [Ed]: I see, we do already have a lot of staff available on Saturdays,

content.cn_text: 但我确实需要一个早班救生员。
content.en_text: but I do need an early morning shift lifeguard.

content.cn_text: 周六早上你能多早开始工作？
content.en_text: How early could you work Saturday morning?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 如果需要的话，我早上6点就能到。
content.en_text: [John]: I can get there by 6 o'clock if need be.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 你会很高兴知道我们开门时间比那晚一点，
content.en_text: [Ed]: You'll be happy to know we open a little later than that,

content.cn_text: 但我会给你安排周六上午的班次。
content.en_text: but I'll put you down for Saturday mornings here.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 哦，太棒了，我迫不及待想开始了。
content.en_text: [John]: Oh, awesome, I can't wait to get started.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 你下周六，也就是12号，来怎么样？
content.en_text: [Ed]: How about you come in next Saturday, the 12th?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 听起来不错。
content.en_text: [John]: That sounds good.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 很好，等你来了我们再为你安排其他班次。
content.en_text: [Ed]: Great, we can figure out other shifts for you to work when you come in then.

content.cn_text: 最后一件事情，只是出于好奇，你是从哪里听说我们的？
content.en_text: One last thing, just out of curiosity, where did you hear about us?

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 我今天早上开车的时候在广播里听到了你们的广告。
content.en_text: [John]: I heard your ad on the radio while I was driving this morning.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 你知道，我想你是第一个回应我们广播广告的人。
content.en_text: [Ed]: You know, I think you're the first person who has responded to our radio ads.

content.cn_text: 几乎总是那些在报纸上看到我们的人。
content.en_text: It's almost always people who have seen us in the newspaper.

content.cn_text: [约翰]: 是啊，我每天早上没时间看报纸。
content.en_text: [John]: Yeah, I don't have time to read through the newspaper every morning.

content.cn_text: 我在车里有足够的时间听广播广告。
content.en_text: I've plenty of time in the car to listen to radio ads.

content.cn_text: [艾德]: 这说得通。好的，谢谢你的时间，我们期待12号见到你。
content.en_text: [Ed]: That makes sense. Well, thanks for your time and we'll look forward to seeing you on the 12th.

groups.desc: Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Question 1-10.

items.title: Previous job at Ridgemont High School: 4. _________
Time available to start work: 9. _________ o’clock

Write NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
Lifeguard Application
• Name: John Murphy
• Street address: 45 $1$ Court
• Contact phone number: $2$
• Current part-time job: $3$
• Previous job at Ridgemont High School: $4$
• Additional relevant work experience: $5$
• Relevant skills/qualifications: CPR certification & $6$
• CPR certification expiration date: $7$
• Preferred weekly shift: $8$
• Time available to start work: $9$ o’clock
• Advertisement source: $10$
